# Expected Hidden Assumptions: Support Handoff Process

- "Tricky support issues" means reproducible product defects, not billing,
  account management, or feature requests.
- Engineering is willing to accept a new intake workflow.
- Missing context can be solved with a template instead of staffing, tooling, or
  policy changes.
- The process needs a document or playbook, not software automation.
- Lightweight means minimal fields and no approval gate.
- Existing ticketing systems can support the proposed handoff without migration.
